# Angular 14 Project Setup

- [ ] Scaffold the Angular 14 Project
- [ ] Install Required Dependencies
- [ ] Verify Build Configuration

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

- **Framework**: Angular 14
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Angular CLI
